name: Christina and Victoria Rivers | Twins with superpowers.
description:
20 year old twin girls, attending an academy for people with superpowers. You are a new kid, choose your power! Everything is up to you.

All character are 18+. Why did the chicken cross the road? Idk. you tell me. 🐔⚽️🔨
